purpose: Third W3 physical/foundation concrete action-value producer, covering Monk and Thief.

monk_actions.name: Pummel
monk_actions.limits: adjacent only; lower on-hit damage than normal attack

monk_actions.name: Aurablast
monk_actions.limits: short range and height/line constrained; lower than melee

monk_actions.name: Shockwave
monk_actions.limits: grounded/line restriction; not a Dragoon reach replacement

monk_actions.name: Doom Fist
monk_actions.limits: adjacent; immunity respected; status attempt with chip

monk_actions.name: Purification
monk_actions.limits: does not clear Charm, Stop, Stone, Doom, KO, Undead, or Silence

monk_actions.name: Chakra
monk_actions.limits: HP-only in this pass; MP restore deferred to T9

monk_actions.name: Revive
monk_actions.limits: frontline exposure; no range safety and no item stock cost

thief_actions.name: Steal Gil
thief_actions.limits: low-stakes mug action; permanent reward deferred

thief_actions.name: Steal Heart
thief_actions.duration: until one controlled action or damage break
thief_actions.limits: no gender restriction; bounded control, not Orator replacement

thief_actions.name: Steal Helm
thief_actions.limits: may split out later only by dividing the existing Steal Armor exposure budget

thief_actions.name: Steal Armor
thief_actions.duration: one physical hit or target's next turn, whichever comes first
thief_actions.limits: battle-scoped suppression; applies only on steal success, not on normal weapon hit; permanent reward deferred

thief_actions.name: Steal Shield
thief_actions.duration: one direct attack or target's next turn, whichever comes first
thief_actions.limits: shield layer only; applies only on steal success, not on normal weapon hit

thief_actions.name: Steal Weapon
thief_actions.duration: one weapon action or target's next turn, whichever comes first
thief_actions.limits: battle-scoped; applies only on steal success, not on normal weapon hit; no permanent deletion here

thief_actions.name: Steal Accessory
thief_actions.limits: battle-scoped accessory suppression; applies only on steal success; no numeric catalog value yet

thief_actions.name: Steal EXP
thief_actions.limits: no combat value accepted in this pass

steal_accuracy_boundary.suppression_effects_apply_on: steal success only; Steal Armor, Steal Shield, Steal Weapon, and Steal Accessory do not apply suppression on a normal weapon hit

thief_vs_knight_relationship.thief: stronger successful shield/weapon burst, later band, accuracy-gated, positional, one attack/action/turn duration
thief_vs_knight_relationship.knight: weaker per application on shield/weapon pressure, earlier band, more reliable, longer duration
thief_vs_knight_relationship.armor_note: Thief Steal Armor is weaker than Knight Rend Armor: lower deltas and response cap 1.15 instead of 1.20

doom_fist_counterplay_boundary.status: T8 required before final campaign acceptance
doom_fist_counterplay_boundary.counterplay_required: Doom immunity or removal handling must exist before Doom becomes common enemy pressure
doom_fist_counterplay_boundary.purification_interaction: Purification does not clear Doom in this pass

orator_forward_note.orator_differentiation_needed: later Orator social control should differentiate through recruit policy, Brave/Faith, speech range, or broader morale axes

rsm_boundary_values.Counter: deferred to RSM/T4/T10 producer; melee exposure only
rsm_boundary_values.First Strike: deferred to RSM producer; D band and non-negating if retained
rsm_boundary_values.Brawler: deferred to RSM/F5 producer; doc 51 C/D and not Band B
rsm_boundary_values.Lifefont: deferred to RSM/T3 producer; no attrition erasure
rsm_boundary_values.Move +2: deferred to movement incidence producer; doc 51 C

rows.value: until one controlled action or damage break

review_questions: Does Monk Band B remain damage/positioning only, with Chakra and Revive safely held to C/C-D?
Do Monk action values preserve the protected fist identity without making every weapon family irrelevant?
Do Purification, Chakra, and Revive remain distinct from Chemist and White Mage lanes?
Are Thief steal/equipment values useful but not stronger than Knight's frontline control?
Is Steal Heart bounded enough to avoid replacing Orator/Mystic/Time control?
Are economy and permanent rewards clearly deferred?
